column1: # Baseline of mods that SHOULD be in pack/mods/. scripts/check-mod-manifest
# diffs this against the current .pw.toml set and fails on drift.
# Format: slug<TAB>side — one per line, '#' comments and blank lines ignored.
# Slug is the basename of the .pw.toml file (pack/mods/<slug>.pw.toml).
# Regenerate after packwiz add/remove via: scripts/check-mod-manifest --fix
